qa_pairs.question: Which conductors have at least 11 years of work experience?

WHERE conductor.year_of_work >= 11

JOIN orchestra ON conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id
WHERE orchestra.year_of_founded <= 2004.0 AND orchestra.record_company = 'Decca Records' AND conductor.year_of_work <= 12
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which conductor entities with year of work at most '12', having at least one related orchestra record (linked on conductor.conductor_id = orchestra.conductor_id) with year of founded at most '2004.0' and record company equal to 'Decca Records'?
